primary.description: Forest Green - Represents trust, warmth, and organic local connection.

background.description: Pure white base with warm stone/off-white for secondary surfaces.

headings.description: Outfit provides a modern, geometric yet friendly feel, fitting the Indian-friendly aesthetic.

body.description: Manrope is highly legible and warm, perfect for reading travel itineraries and chat messages.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-stone-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-stone-900

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing: p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped containers.

landing_page.alignment: Asymmetrical layouts where possible. Left-align dense content and hero text.

dashboard.style: Control Room layout. Dense, functional, cardless or 1px flat borders with no heavy drop shadows.

marketplace_card.structure: Clean, flat rectangular card. Image on top (aspect-square or 4:5), 1px subtle border (#E7E5E4).
marketplace_card.content: Local guide name, location, rating, and package price prominently displayed.

buttons.primary: bg-green-800 text-white hover:bg-green-900 px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-stone-300 text-stone-700 hover:bg-stone-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-md transition-colors

chat_ui.layout: Flexbox column for messages. Traveller messages on right (bg-green-100 text-green-900), guide on left (bg-stone-100 text-stone-800).
chat_ui.input: Shadcn input, heavily customized to have 1px border, rounded-full, with a green send button.

navigation.style: Glassmorphism if scrolling over hero (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-stone-200), otherwise solid white.
navigation.links: Visible on desktop. No hamburger menu on desktop.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-green-900 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interaction.focus: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-600 focus:outline-none.

media_and_images.style: No cheesy stock photos. Use abstract green textures and minimal illustrative objects to establish the earthy and travel vibe.

hero_background.description: Green textile abstract texture. Use with a white/off-white overlay to give a warm, organic background.

abstract_accent_1.description: Blurry green and blue background. Good for soft, atmospheric accents.

illustration_concept.description: Abstract shapes representing custom itinerary building.

travel_concept.description: Hands drawing a world map on paper. Ideal for 'How it Works' or 'Destinations' section.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML+Tailwind for complex marketing layouts like the Hero to allow asymmetry.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, modals, tables, and Dashboard components. Customize Shadcn to match the earthy theme by removing harsh shadows and using soft 1px borders.
Write code using .js and .jsx extensions, not .tsx.
Always explicitly set text color on hover. E.g., hover:bg-green-800 hover:text-white.
Adhere to typography rules: Outfit for headings, Manrope for body text. Do not use Inter or Roboto.
Add data-testid attributes to all actionable components.
